description: Regression tests for companion file enforcement gates, hard gates inline in agent definition, regression registration protocol, build skill companion gate.

assertions.pattern: agent def has Hard Gates section header
assertions.context: §14 Hard Gates section exists in agent definition

assertions.pattern: agent def §14 is NOT just a reference pointer
assertions.context: CRITICAL: §14 must have gate content inline, not a pointer to hard_gates.md

assertions.pattern: agent def has companion file minimum gate
assertions.context: CRITICAL: The companion file minimum gate must be in the agent system prompt

assertions.pattern: agent def says no matches-spec exemption
assertions.context: The 'matches spec = no entry needed' exemption must be explicitly removed

assertions.pattern: agent def has minimum one IMPL line
assertions.context: Gate must specify minimum one [IMPL] line per code commit

assertions.pattern: agent def says status tag is separate commit
assertions.context: Status tag commit must be separate from implementation commits

assertions.pattern: agent def has companion file pre-check
assertions.context: Status tag pre-check: companion file has new entries this session

assertions.pattern: agent def has spec alignment pre-check
assertions.context: Status tag pre-check: re-read spec and walk requirements

assertions.pattern: agent def has web test pre-check
assertions.context: Status tag pre-check: web test passed with zero BUG/DRIFT

assertions.pattern: agent def has plan alignment pre-check
assertions.context: Status tag pre-check: delivery plan alignment

assertions.pattern: agent def has FORBIDDEN pre-scan gate
assertions.context: FORBIDDEN pattern pre-scan blocks builds with violations

assertions.pattern: agent def has spec existence gate
assertions.context: Feature spec must exist before implementation starts

assertions.pattern: agent def has re-verification fast path
assertions.context: Re-verification skips re-implementation when tests already pass

assertions.pattern: agent def has execution group dispatch rule
assertions.context: Parallel dispatch is mandatory for 2+ independent features

assertions.pattern: agent def says Verified is QA-only
assertions.context: Engineer must not use [Verified] tag — reserved for QA

assertions.pattern: agent def says tests.json must come from runner
assertions.context: tests.json must come from test runner, never hand-written

assertions.pattern: agent def has PM scenario heading format gate
assertions.context: PM gate: scenarios use #### (four hashes)

assertions.pattern: agent def has PM required sections gate
assertions.context: PM gate: overview, requirements, scenarios sections required

assertions.pattern: agent def has PM no implementation notes gate
assertions.context: PM gate: no Implementation Notes in feature files

assertions.pattern: agent def has PM scenarios untagged gate
assertions.context: PM gate: scenarios written without @auto/@manual tags

assertions.pattern: agent def has QA verified mandatory gate
assertions.context: QA gate: [Verified] tag is mandatory on QA status commits

assertions.pattern: agent def has QA delivery plan gating
assertions.context: QA gate: don't mark Complete if feature in PENDING phase

assertions.pattern: agent def has QA companion edits no reset
assertions.context: QA gate: companion edits don't reset feature lifecycle

assertions.pattern: agent def has QA regression readiness gate
assertions.context: QA gate: all @auto scenarios need regression JSON before tests run

assertions.pattern: agent def has regression registration gate
assertions.context: Regression Registration Gate section exists in agent definition

assertions.pattern: agent def says all regression work through purlin:regression
assertions.context: Agent definition mandates all regression work go through the skill

assertions.pattern: agent def says unregistered tests invisible
assertions.context: Agent definition warns unregistered tests are invisible to triage

assertions.pattern: regression skill has spec registration protocol
assertions.context: Regression skill has the mandatory Spec Registration Protocol section

assertions.pattern: regression skill says Regression Guidance section
assertions.context: Regression skill requires Regression Guidance section in feature spec

assertions.pattern: regression skill author step has registration
assertions.context: Regression skill author subcommand includes mandatory registration step

assertions.pattern: regression skill says do not commit without registration
assertions.context: Regression skill blocks committing regression JSON without spec registration

assertions.pattern: build skill Step 4 has companion file gate
assertions.context: Build SKILL.md Step 4 has the Companion File Gate

assertions.pattern: build skill Step 4 blocks without new entries
assertions.context: Build skill blocks status tag when companion has no new entries

assertions.pattern: build skill Step 4 says mechanical check
assertions.context: Build skill companion gate is a mechanical check

assertions.pattern: build skill Step 4 says not a judgment call
assertions.context: Build skill companion gate is not a judgment call

assertions.pattern: build skill Step 2 says record in impl.md
assertions.context: Build skill Step 2 requires recording in companion impl.md

assertions.pattern: build skill Step 2 has IMPL tag documentation
assertions.context: Build skill Step 2 documents the [IMPL] tag
